name: My law firm isn't showing up in Perplexity answers—how do I fix that fast?
description: Add attorney-attributed FAQs answering client questions with local details to appear in Perplexity.[2][3] Test immediately.

mainEntity.name: My law firm isn't showing up in Perplexity answers—how do I fix that fast?

acceptedAnswer.text: Add attorney-attributed FAQs answering client questions with local details to appear in Perplexity.[2][3] Test immediately.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Update your website with clear, question-answering content attributed to named attorneys to boost AEO visibility in tools like Perplexity.** AI prioritizes authoritative, utility-rich sources.[2][6]

Firms invisible in AI results lose leads as users rely on generated summaries.[7] This is urgent in high-competition areas like Chicago or Houston.

**Key factors:**
- Answer real client questions concisely (e.g., 'What happens at a first consultation?').[3]
- Include local details like courthouse names.[2]
- Add bio links and resources (forms, maps).[2]
- Ensure EEAT signals.[2]

Rewrite top pages as FAQs, test queries in AI tools, and monitor citations. Avoid generic content; be specific to your jurisdiction.[3]
